Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: SnippetApp Chrome extension

Features:
- Chrome Manifest V3 extension with Firebase backend
- Google OAuth authentication
- Snippet CRUD \(create, edit, delete\)
- Shortcode expansion in all text inputs
- Dynamic tokens: {date}, {time}, {clipboard}, {cursor}
- Team sharing by email
- Configurable trigger prefix
- Landing page with Firebase hosting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
